actions.value: Once you regain access to your account, I suggest that you go into Menu(≡) > Settings > Tap to Unlock Account Settings, and unlock them using your password - then you can set up the 2-Factor Security key, and the Password Recovery token (and store them securely!) to protect your Edge account for many years to come 🔐👍

Once you regain access to your account, I suggest that you go into Menu(≡) > Settings > Tap to Unlock Account Settings, and unlock them using your password - then you can set up the 2-Factor Security key, and the Password Recovery token (and store them securely!) to protect your Edge account for many years to come 🔐👍
